# function: extract_identity_service_url

Parses the Host URL of a Identity Service instance and returns the value.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# This will return a string value
output "cis_url" {
  value = provider::custom::extract_identity_service_url(btp_subaccount_subscription.identity_services.subscription_url)
  sensitive   = true
  description = "SAP Cloud Identity Service API URL"
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
extract_identity_service_url(url string) string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `url` (String) Service Instance URL
